popup.body:
Dr. Sabina Nasir will be attending BDCDS in Birmingham on 15-16 May 2026. Book a meeting with her at the event to discuss your dental treatment plan.

Want to come along? It is [FREE](https://forms.reg.buzz/dentistry-show-splash/) to register for dental professionals!

[MORE INFO](https://birmingham.dentistryshow.co.uk/)

versions.change_description: Rolled back to the state before version 411 ("01604 111111")

versions.change_description: On the home page replace '8.15 am to 5pm' to 8.30am to 5.30pm
On the services page replace' 8.15am to 5 pm' to '8.30am to 5.30pm'

on the home page under testimonials add'We have three generations of  our family being attentively looked aftre by Sabina and the Delapre Dental Care team and would  thoroughly reommend them!  Savina has a bright  easy manner and makes nervous patiens feel comforable, explains options very clearly and makes sure  that  everone feels well cared for at eacch visit: wheter its ofr  a mouth splint, exxtracction, plate or regular hygiencce. 22.4.2026
on the home page, change "25/3/26" to "25.3.2026"

On the home page under testimonials add ' I have been coming to this surgery since I was a small child and the great service has continued with the current team at Delapre Dental  Care'.
Thank you!

Emma.H
